title: SSA OIG Audit A-15-21-51117 (Condensed Summary): Florida DDS Operations
description: Short internal condensation of SSA Office of the Inspector General audit A-15-21-51117 on Florida DDS operations. Records the topic (DDS operations) and the key finding that state DDS administrative process inefficiencies delayed benefit payments and increased case processing times. A few-line synthesis for quick reference, not the OIG's own published report text.

source.publisher: U.S. Social Security Administration, Office of the Inspector General (SSA OIG)
source.title: SSA OIG audit A-15-21-51117 — Florida DDS operations (condensed summary)
